title: Duckie's Minos Prime Creaking
description: Transforms the Creaking into Minos Prime from Ultrakill. Complete with a textured spawn egg and SFX.
body:
# Duckie's Minos Prime Creaking


Transforms the Creaking into Minos Prime from Ultrakill. Complete with a textured spawn egg and SFX. Textures are by me, sounds are from Ultrakill. 

Sounds:
- "Free at last" - Minos spawns
- "Prepare thyself" - Minos sees the player
- "Judgement" - Minos attacks
- "Crush" - Minos attacks
- "Die" - Minos attacks
- "Thy end is now" - Minos attacks
- "Weak" - Minos is hit
- "Useless" - Minos is hit
- Scream - Minos dies
